observations.how_to_use: A new user installs the skill with `runx add umbtest03/sbom-maker@sha-81f9cdc918f0 --registry https://api.runx.ai`. They run the skill locally by passing the lockfile_type and lockfile via the --input flags, and verify it by running `runx verify --receipt dogfood_receipt.json` on the output JSON.
